learning_outcomes.statement: Analyze the structure and purpose of authorial exposition on the Design Page to identify key elements that support self-directed learning.
learning_outcomes.notes: Focus on how exposition guides learners in a self-directed context.

learning_outcomes.statement: Evaluate the role of activity_preamble exposition on the DLA in framing learner engagement and guiding activity initiation.
learning_outcomes.notes: Emphasize assessment of exposition effectiveness in motivating learners.

learning_outcomes.statement: Construct a coherent delivery_context for self-directed learning that integrates authorial and activity_preamble expositions to enhance learner autonomy.
learning_outcomes.notes: Outcome targets synthesis of exposition types into a unified learning context.

alignment_notes: Outcomes align with the design focus on self-directed learning and exposition roles in Sprint 42-2 and 42-3.
